title: Economic survey reports positive growth in Parihar assembly segment
snippet_text: Local growth indicators and agricultural trade volumes in Parihar show upward trends, becoming a talking point for local candidates.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Parihar
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Parihar assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Political rally in Parihar draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Parihar promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Parihar
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Parihar constituency.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Parihar
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Parihar assembly segment.

title: Independent candidates emerge as spoilers in Parihar triangular contest
snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Parihar, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.
